d: Arden selects a tile and casts lightning strikes on all surrounding enemies within 2 tiles, dealing [[160%]]<ATK> damage and creating a dark cloud that lingers for [[7]]s. The dark cloud will repeatedly strike controlled enemies below with lightning, dealing [[80%]]<ATK> damage each time. An enemy can only be struck once every [[2]]s. Arden prioritizes selecting the tile with the most surrounding enemies when casting the lightning strikes.
Deals [[180%]]<ATK> damage with the first lightning strike, and [[90%]]<ATK> damage with the subsequent lightning strike.
Deals [[190%]]<ATK> damage with the first lightning strike, and [[95%]]<ATK> damage with the subsequent lightning strike.
Deals [[200%]]<ATK> damage with the first lightning strike, and [[100%]]<ATK> damage with the subsequent lightning strike.
Deals [[210%]]<ATK> damage with the first lightning strike, and [[110%]]<ATK> damage with the subsequent lightning strike.
Arden summons vines to entangle [[2]] closest enemies for [[2]]s, making them unable to move or act while dealing [[50%]]<ATK> damage every [[1]]s. Arden prioritizes enemies under the dark cloud.
Increases damage to [[55%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[60%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[65%]]<ATK>.
Arden recovers [[12]] Energy whenever a non-summoned enemy is controlled. This effect can trigger once per enemy every [[2]]s.
Triggers once per enemy every [[1.5]]s.
Triggers once per enemy every [[1]]s.
Recovers [[15]] Energy.
Increases ATK by [[12%]] during battle.
Increases ATK by [[16%]] during battle.
Increases ATK by [[20%]] during battle.
Arden casts Entangling Vines on all enemies under the dark cloud once after casting Force of Nature.
Increases the range of Force of Nature to [[3]] tiles.
Increases the duration of Entangling Vines to [[3]]s.
Increases the duration of Entangling Vines to [[3.5]]s.
Arden reduces the lightning strike interval of Force of Nature for the same enemy by [[-1]]s.
